summary: Testing iteration 2: Profile system (multi-profile, switch, delete), Settings screen (toggles, selectors), Watch History screen. Backend: 80% passing (8/10 profile/history tests). Frontend: All new screens render correctly when accessed directly. CRITICAL ISSUE: Profile tab doesn't recognize auth state - shows signed-out view despite user being logged in.

minor.issue: Test isolation issue: After creating a new profile, GET /api/profiles sometimes returns only 1 profile instead of 2 (default + new). May be related to test fixture creating separate users per test.
Test fails with 'Cannot delete the only profile' when trying to delete a newly created profile. Suggests profile counting or retrieval issue.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Profile tab shows 'Join Anime World' signed-out view even when user is logged in. User can register/login successfully (visible on other tabs) but Profile tab doesn't recognize auth state. AuthContext not properly propagating to profile.tsx.

integration_issues.flow: Profile Tab Navigation from Logged-in State
integration_issues.issue: After successful registration, navigating to Profile tab shows signed-out view. Auth token may not be persisting correctly or Profile screen's useAuth() hook has initialization issue.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - appears frequently

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Profile tab (app/(tabs)/profile.tsx) not recognizing auth state. Debug useAuth() hook in Profile screen - check if useEffect dependencies are correct, verify AuthContext is properly wrapped around tab navigator
Investigate why Profile tab loads signed-out view while Home/Browse tabs show user as logged in
Test profile navigation AFTER fixing auth state issue - current tests blocked by this bug
Review backend profile GET endpoint - ensure it returns all profiles for user, not just active one
Fix test_create_new_profile and test_delete_profile backend test failures (may be test isolation issue rather than actual bug)
critical_code_review_comments: Profile tab auth integration is broken - useAuth() in profile.tsx (line 19: if (user) loadActiveProfile()) appears correct but auth state is not available when component mounts
Possible race condition: Profile tab may be rendering before AuthContext initializes. Check AuthContext.tsx for proper async storage token loading
All new screens (Settings, History, Switch Profile) render correctly when accessed via direct URL - routes are properly configured
Backend APIs are fully functional: Profiles CRUD (create default, add profile, switch, delete with validation), History upsert working correctly
Settings screen has excellent UI with working toggles, quality selector, language selector, clear cache/history buttons - no issues found in standalone testing
Switch Profile screen UI is correct (Add Profile, Manage Profiles buttons visible) but doesn't show existing profiles when not authenticated

success_rate.backend: 80% (8/10 tests passed for profiles & history APIs)
success_rate.frontend: ~40% (screens render correctly but auth integration broken, blocking full testing)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed users. Created test user 'profiletest19417' via UI for frontend testing. curl script at /tmp/test_profile_api.sh successfully tested all profile/history endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG BLOCKS TESTING: Profile tab shows signed-out view despite user being logged in. This prevents testing all profile features (Switch Profile, Settings, Watch History navigation from profile menu). Backend APIs are 80% working. All new screens render correctly via direct URL access. Once auth issue is fixed, need to test: profile switching flow, add/delete profiles, Settings toggles functionality, Watch History data display, navigation from profile menu to all screens.
rca_of_issue:
Root cause analysis of Profile tab auth issue:

1. REPRODUCTION STEPS:
   - Register new user via auth modal
   - User successfully registers (token received, username shows in header briefly)
   - Navigate to Profile tab
   - Profile tab shows 'Join Anime World' signed-out view instead of user profile

2. OBSERVED BEHAVIOR:
   - Home tab: User appears logged in initially after registration
   - Profile tab: Always shows signed-out view
   - After navigation, even Home tab loses auth state
   - Direct URL access to /settings, /history, /switch-profile works (screens render)

3. LIKELY CAUSES:
   - AuthContext may not be persisting token to AsyncStorage properly after registration
   - Profile tab's useEffect may be running before auth state is hydrated from storage
   - Possible race condition in token persistence vs component mount timing
   - Tab navigator may be mounting Profile tab before auth initialization completes

4. EVIDENCE:
   - Backend APIs work perfectly via curl (token auth successful)
   - All screens render correctly when accessed directly
   - Issue is specifically with AuthContext state propagation to Profile tab
   - useAuth() hook in profile.tsx returns null/undefined user despite successful login

5. SUGGESTED FIX:
   - Check AuthContext.tsx: Ensure loadAuthToken() is called on mount and completes before rendering children
   - Add loading state to AuthContext to prevent premature rendering
   - Verify AsyncStorage.setItem('auth_token') is being called after registration
   - Add console.log in profile.tsx useEffect to debug user state value
   - Consider adding authentication guard/wrapper for tab navigator
